title: chenopodium strictum subsp. striatiforme
intro: Chenopodium strictum subsp. striatiforme, also known as Striated Goosefoot, is a subspecies of the Chenopodium strictum plant, a type of succulent herb that belongs to the goosefoot family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Chenopodium strictum subsp. striatiforme include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium strictum subsp. striatiforme can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
